what: Display the project dashboard with collapsible sections for skills, rules, hooks and MCPs
why: Give users a single-page overview of a project's Claude Code configuration with inline editing via dialogs

error_handling.action: Show error message in that accordion section

decisions.reason: Parallel fetch all 4 resources on mount
decisions.rationale: All 4 lists are needed for counts immediately; parallel fetch minimises perceived latency

decisions.reason: Edit dialogs inside accordion components (not separate route)
decisions.rationale: Keeps related state co-located; user stays on dashboard context
